title: CreaturePals
description: Chat with any mob in Minecraft For Free! All creatures can talk & react with all the other creatures and players!
body:
### Chat with any mob in Minecraft For Free! All creatures can talk & react against each other and other players!

Do not need to set up the API yourself or buy anything. Download the [Player2 app](https://player2.game/), install the Fabric API, and play this mod in Minecraft. 

Use /creaturepals tts set on/off to turn on and off the speech function.

Create meaningful conversations and enduring friendships? Watch the mobs and AI players interact with each other in chaos.

Disclaimer: This is a player2 mod and is not affiliated with the CreatureChat developers.

👉 [Check releases](https://github.com/elefant-ai/creature-chat-evolved/releases)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ABcLprr_f-g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
 

### What is CreaturePals? How is it different from the original CreatureChat?

Significant work has been put into CreaturePals for the following functions:

**Free AI-Driven Chats:** Using Player2 APIs, support LLM/TTS so each conversation is unique and engaging! 

**New message system:** You can chat with the mobs from Bubble and in-game chat!

**Multi-Player:** Mobs can chat with each other as well as other players, including AIs.

**New version support:** Evolved now supports 1.21.1 Fabric and Neoforge.

Plus, all the existing functions in CreatureChat

**Behaviors:** Creatures can make decisions on their own and follow, Flee, attack, Protect, and more!

**Reactions:** Creatures automatically react to being damaged or receiving items from players.

**Friendship:** Track your relationships from friends to foes.

**Memory:** Creatures remember your past interactions, making each chat more personal.

### How it works

This mod adds the [Player2 interface](https://player2.game/) to the original [CreatureChat](https://modrinth.com/mod/creaturechat) plus other changes. It’s free and open-sourced. Feel free to build your mod on top!
